    Uncomplicate your IT and customer service

    Freshworks provides enterprise-grade, AI-assisted service software to deliver exceptional customer and employee experiences.

    Freddy: Agentic AI
    that reasons, acts, and resolves

    Explore Freddy AISee what’s new

    Designed for ease, built for value

    Faster implementation. Better ROI. Totally transparent costs. Freshworks delivers enterprise-grade performance without the enterprise-level complexity.
    97%
    CSAT
    Hello, happiness.

    Looking for higher satisfaction scores? Solve more customer and employee issues, more quickly and easily. People love that. 

    See the Customer Service Benchmark Report
    74%
    first contact resolution (FCR)
    Get answers. Get going.

    Agentic AI gives users the freedom to find, fix, and finish their issues with a click.

    See the Freshservice Benchmark Report
    ~2m
    average chat resolution
    Solve customer issues sooner

    AI agents cut the number of tickets to solve; you cut your resolution time, and boost productivity.

    See the Customer Service Benchmark Report
    77%
    faster handling time
    Automate to accelerate

    Advanced ticketing, automation, and built-in AI. Better, faster service has arrived.
